name: Week 8 Push — Selective Push (Chest/Shoulders/Triceps)
description: Selective push week. Form check discoveries locked in — parallel feet push press, 50lb incline pause, cable lat raise at 45. Where form was clean, nudge weight: chest press tries 185 on later sets, straight arm pulldown tries 115. Everything else holds.

exercises.notes: Full Yuri band warmup with red band. W6/W7: this clears the shoulder crackle better than anything else. Do the full sequence before touching any weight.
Get blood flowing, activate chest and triceps
45/side. W7 actuals: 45x8x3 parallel feet, clean. DO NOT rush back to 50 — 45 with perfect form is the play. Parallel feet, shallow dip, explosive drive. Stop the set if form breaks, even at rep 6.
20lb. W7 actuals: 20x15, shoulder crackly but improved with Yuri warmup. Stay at 20x15 — form was clean and shoulder tolerated it. Not chasing 25 yet.
180 base. W7 actuals: 180x8x3 clean, died on 4th set. 180 is locked in. OK TO PUSH: try 185 on set 2 or 3 (the strongest sets). If 185 feels ugly, drop back to 180 immediately — no grinding.
50lb with pause at bottom. W7 actuals: 50x10x4 all completed, better ROM than 55. STAY AT 50 with pause — the pause is the progression, not the weight. Last set will be a fight, that's fine.
Working number: 8. W7 actuals: 8x11 felt right. Aim for 3x12 clean this week — if all 3 sets hit 12, consider 9 next week. Constant tension, think pec deck.
45. W7 actuals: 45x12, dropped from 50 for stability. STAY AT 45 — both sides crackly at 50. Controlled and stable > heavy and wobbly.
54. W7 actuals: 54x12x3, surprisingly strong. Stay at 54 — can feel all the fibers, steady and safe. Hands shoulder-width for full long head emphasis.
110 base. W7 actuals: 110x12x3 clean. OK TO PUSH: try 115 on set 2 or 3. Straight arms, lats do the work. Stop when shoulders start taking over.

tips: SELECTIVE PUSH: Form check discoveries stay locked in — only push where W7 was clean and confident (chest press, straight arm pulldown).
Push press at 45 is NOT a regression from 50 — it's better reps, better form, better long-term strength. Stay patient.
Yuri band warmup is non-negotiable. It's what makes the shoulder tolerate lat raises and cable work.
Chest press 185 attempt: only on set 2 or 3 when you're warmest. If form breaks, drop back to 180 immediately.
Incline DB: the pause at bottom IS the progression. 50 with pause > 55 without.
Rest 2 min between push press, 2.5 min on chest press, 75s on cables
